ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Injuries that occurred during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current captain of the team */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the team's uniform */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach of the team */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current assistant coach of the team */,
  "training_ground" TEXT /* Location where the team trains */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Names of the team's sponsors */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Team's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_assistant_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES captains ("captain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Player's injury status */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Player's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captains" (
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each captaincy */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player serving as captain */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player captains */,
  "captaincy_start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started serving as captain */,
  "captaincy_end_date" TEXT /* Date the player stopped serving as captain (if applicable) */,
  "assistant_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current assistant captain */,
  "leadership_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the captain's leadership qualities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("captain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captains_assistant_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captains_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captains_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the performance is related to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is being tracked */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made */,
  "fouls_given" INTEGER /* Number of fouls given */,
  "fouls_received" INTEGER /* Number of fouls received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the roster is related to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the roster is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the roster */,
  "starter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player started the match */,
  "substitute_in" INTEGER /* Minute the player was substituted into the match (if applicable) */,
  "substitute_out" INTEGER /* Minute the player was substituted out of the match (if applicable) */,
  "position_on_field" TEXT /* Position the player played in the match */,
  "substitution_reason" TEXT /* Reason for substitution (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's contract */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Names of previous teams the coach has managed */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coach's coaching style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, team manager, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module of the system accessed (e.g., matches, players, performance) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue in terms of number of spectators */,
  "opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was opened */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  "seating_type" TEXT /* Type of seating (e.g., general, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)
